title: Super Mario Bros.
description: A classic platformer game featuring Mario and Luigi journeying through the Mushroom Kingdom to rescue Princess Toadstool.

title: Tetris
description: An iconic puzzle game where players must rotate and arrange falling blocks to form complete lines.

title: The Legend of Zelda
description: Follow Link as he explores the land of Hyrule, defeats monsters, and collects the pieces of the Triforce.

title: Pac-Man
description: Navigate a maze, eat all the pac-dots, and avoid ghosts in one of the most famous arcade games of all time.

title: Sonic the Hedgehog
description: Speed through zones, collect rings, and defeat Dr. Robotnik in this iconic Sega platformer.

title: DOOM
description: A pioneering first-person shooter that defined the genre, dropping players onto Mars to battle demonic forces.

title: Final Fantasy VII
description: An epic role-playing game following Cloud Strife and Avalanche as they fight against the megacorporation Shinra.

title: Street Fighter II
description: The competitive fighting game that revolutionized the genre, featuring a diverse cast of world warriors.

title: Castlevania: SotN
description: Explore Dracula's castle as Alucard in this masterpiece that helped define the Metroidvania genre.

title: Chrono Trigger
description: A legendary time-traveling RPG created by a dream team of developers.

title: Super Metroid
description: Guide bounty hunter Samus Aran through the labyrinthine planet of Zebes to retrieve the infant Metroid.

title: Metal Gear Solid
description: Infiltrate a nuclear weapons facility in this cinematic and genre-defining stealth action game.

title: Space Invaders
description: Defend the Earth from waves of descending aliens in this seminal arcade classic.

title: Donkey Kong Country
description: A breakthrough platformer known for its pre-rendered 3D graphics and engaging gameplay.

title: Half-Life
description: A groundbreaking narrative-driven shooter where you must survive an alien invasion at the Black Mesa Research Facility.

title: Pokémon Red
description: Catch, train, and battle 151 different creatures in your quest to become a Pokémon Master.
